payload.answer: Treat this as a superseding employment update. Sam's current employer should be Point72. The prior fact that Sam works at Goldman is no longer current and should only be retained, if at all, as past employment.
citations: Existing current fact - Sam works at Goldman
New fact - Sam left Goldman and joined Point72

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement appears to refer to the same Sam and explicitly describes an employment transition, so it should update the existing person record rather than create a new one.

details: Detected a direct employment transition from Goldman to Point72.
Classified the existing current-employment fact as superseded.
Prepared an updated current fact and a historical employment fact.

repair_options: Replace the current employment fact 'Sam works at Goldman' with 'Sam works at Point72'.
Convert Goldman from current employer to former employer/history.
Optionally store the transition as history: 'Sam left Goldman and joined Point72'.
